name: Ankle Hop Stick
harder_raw: single-leg ankle hop stick or higher hop
easier_raw: lower hop or two-foot landing

name: Wall Drive Hold
harder_raw: add a leg-switch (drive) or alternating drives
easier_raw: shorter holds or a higher hand position (more upright)

name: A-Skip Moving
harder_raw: A-skip into a sprint or higher cadence
easier_raw: A-march or A-skip in place

name: Band Glute Bridge
harder_raw: single-leg banded bridge or hip load
easier_raw: lighter band or no band

name: Crossover Step
harder_raw: add a reactive cue or sprint out
easier_raw: walk through the crossover pattern slowly

name: Reactive 5m Sprint
harder_raw: react to less predictable cues or longer distance
easier_raw: self-initiated start or shorter distance

name: Banded Standing Adduction
harder_raw: heavier band or slower tempo
easier_raw: lighter band or reduce range

name: Dead Bug with DB
harder_raw: heavier DB or both limbs simultaneously
easier_raw: lighter/no weight (bodyweight dead bug)

name: Jump Rope — Steady
harder_raw: longer duration or faster steady pace
easier_raw: shorter bouts or step-throughs

name: Bear Crawl Variations
harder_raw: add load, longer distance, or harder direction patterns
easier_raw: forward crawl only, slower, shorter distance

name: Fast Feet / Ladder Equiv
harder_raw: faster cadence or more complex patterns
easier_raw: slower walk-through of the pattern

name: Reactive Lateral Start
harder_raw: less predictable cues or more directions
easier_raw: self-initiated lateral start or fewer directions

name: Deep Squat Hold
harder_raw: longer hold or light goblet load
easier_raw: hold a support or elevate the heels slightly

name: SL Balance — Eyes Closed
harder_raw: unstable surface or add a head turn
easier_raw: open eyes or lightly touch a support

name: Plank Shoulder Tap
harder_raw: feet closer together or add a tempo
easier_raw: wider feet or from the knees

name: Hollow Rock
harder_raw: arms fully overhead or hold a light DB
easier_raw: tucked hollow rock (knees bent)

name: Depth Drop (Low Box)
harder_raw: higher box or single-leg depth drop
easier_raw: lower box or step-down to a stick

name: A-Skip + March Combo
harder_raw: progress into a sprint after the combo
easier_raw: march only, or in place

name: Banded Front Squat
harder_raw: heavier band or bottom pause
easier_raw: lighter band or bodyweight goblet squat

name: Banded Chop / Lift
harder_raw: heavier band, standing, or add rotation
easier_raw: lighter band or smaller range

name: Lateral Skater Bound
harder_raw: cover more distance or add reactive cues
easier_raw: skater hop with a brief stick between bounds

name: Single-Leg Pogo Hops
harder_raw: higher/faster hops or add directional travel
easier_raw: two-leg pogo hops or lower height

name: Crossover Step to Sprint
harder_raw: add a reactive cue or longer sprint
easier_raw: slower, walk-through transition

name: Reactive Mirror Sprint
harder_raw: faster/larger movements or more directions
easier_raw: slower, fewer directions, or a leader who telegraphs moves

name: SL Box Step-Down
harder_raw: higher box or hold a DB
easier_raw: lower box or reduce range

name: Banded RDL
harder_raw: heavier band or pause at the stretch
easier_raw: lighter band or shorter range

name: Tall Plank DB Drag
harder_raw: heavier DB or feet closer
easier_raw: lighter DB, wider feet, or from the knees

name: Jump Rope — Intervals
harder_raw: longer/harder work or shorter rest
easier_raw: shorter work, longer rest, or steady skipping

name: Multi-Direction Bound
harder_raw: faster transitions or reactive (cued) directions
easier_raw: fewer directions or stick each landing

name: A-Skip + B-Skip
harder_raw: faster cadence or progress into a sprint
easier_raw: A-skip only, or march the B pattern slowly

name: Reactive 4-Cone
harder_raw: more cones, faster cues, or add a puck
easier_raw: fewer cones, slower cues, or pre-planned order

name: Iso Wall Sit
harder_raw: DB on the lap or single-leg
easier_raw: shorter hold or higher knee angle

name: High-Low Pogo Combo
harder_raw: single-leg or faster transitions
easier_raw: steady same-height pogos

name: Resisted → Free Sprint
harder_raw: optimize the resistance/release or longer free portion
easier_raw: lighter resistance or run the two portions separately

name: DB Goblet Lateral Lunge
harder_raw: heavier DB or pause at depth
easier_raw: bodyweight or reduce depth

name: Sprint Intervals 15s
harder_raw: more intervals, shorter rest, or longer work
easier_raw: fewer intervals, longer rest, or shorter sprints

name: Jump Rope — Speed
harder_raw: double-unders or faster bursts
easier_raw: fast single-unders or shorter bursts

name: Crossover Step Bound
harder_raw: faster/longer or add resistance
easier_raw: slower crossover steps without a powerful bound

name: Hill Stride
harder_raw: steeper hill or longer/faster strides
easier_raw: gentler incline or shorter distance

name: Plank to Push-Up
harder_raw: feet closer or add a tempo
easier_raw: from the knees or slow the transitions

name: 20m Flying Sprint
harder_raw: lengthen the fly zone or add light assisted (downhill / towed) sprints
easier_raw: shorten to a 10 m fly or run build-up strides

name: Broad Jump
harder_raw: continuous/repeat broad jumps or jump-to-sprint
easier_raw: shorter jump or step back to reset

name: 20m Sprint
harder_raw: resisted starts (sled or band) or extend to a 30 m sprint
easier_raw: 10 m accelerations focused on the drive phase

name: Squat to Tuck Jump
harder_raw: continuous tuck jumps or higher tuck
easier_raw: jump squat (no tuck) or reduce height

name: A-Skip Resisted
harder_raw: heavier resistance or progress into a resisted sprint
easier_raw: lighter resistance or unresisted A-skip

name: Banded Squat Jump
harder_raw: heavier band or add a hold/DB
easier_raw: lighter band or bodyweight squat jump

name: Rotational Med Ball Toss
harder_raw: heavier ball or more explosive/farther
easier_raw: lighter ball or slower technical reps

name: Rotational Med Ball Side Toss
harder_raw: heavier ball or more explosive
easier_raw: lighter ball or technical-speed reps

name: Mirror Sprint Game
harder_raw: bigger area, more directions, or add a puck/ball
easier_raw: smaller area, slower leader, fewer directions

name: Banded Rotational Press
harder_raw: heavier band or more explosive
easier_raw: lighter band or smaller range

name: SL CMJ Stick
harder_raw: jump for height or add a reach/load
easier_raw: smaller jump or two-foot CMJ stick

name: Squat to Broad Jump
harder_raw: longer pause, deeper squat, or add load
easier_raw: shorter pause or smaller jump

name: Contrast Jump
harder_raw: optimize load/rest or use heavier potentiation
easier_raw: lighter contrast or just explosive jumps alone

name: Banded Rotational Throw (Wall)
harder_raw: heavier band or more explosive
easier_raw: lighter band or technical-speed reps

name: Continuous Lateral Bound
harder_raw: more distance/reps or add a target to clear
easier_raw: bound with a brief stick between reps

name: Band Rotational Scoop Toss
harder_raw: heavier band or more explosive
easier_raw: lighter band or smaller range

name: Repeat Efforts — Shift Simulation
harder_raw: more shifts, longer work, or shorter bench rest
easier_raw: fewer shifts, shorter work, or longer rest

name: Repeat Sprint Ability
harder_raw: more reps or shorter rest
easier_raw: fewer reps, longer rest, or longer recovery between sets
